common.footer: {{appName}} — Clear payslip checks for employees and employers.
common.errorBoundaryMessage: This section failed to load. You can try again or continue using the rest of the app.

auth.devSubtitle: Select a development role to explore role-based portals. No password required.
auth.cognitoPending: Sign in with your organization account. Set VITE_DEV_AUTH_ENABLED=true only for local role-picker development.
auth.cognitoSignInHint: Sign in with your organization account (Amazon Cognito).

landing.title: Ask payroll questions or check your payslip.
landing.heroSubtitle: Built for employees, accountants, and payroll professionals.
landing.heroDisclaimer: Answers are based on uploaded documents and current Israeli labor law. The assistant may make mistakes. Its answers are not a substitute for professional or legal advice.
landing.lead: Get clear answers about your pay, and a simple checklist after you upload a payslip.
landing.validateCtaHint: Upload a payslip and get a clear checklist of what looks fine and what needs attention.

landingChat.lead: Answers are based on your uploaded documents and current labor laws. The assistant may make mistakes and is not a substitute for professional or legal advice.
landingChat.empty: Ask a question, attach a document, then press Send.

welcome.title: How can I help today?
welcome.hint: These are only suggestions — you can ask anything.

popular.pq1: Why was income tax deducted from my pay?
popular.pq3: How many vacation days do I have left?
popular.pq4: Why didn’t I receive travel allowance?
popular.pq5: What does a payslip component mean?

landingChat.placeholder: Ask anything, or attach a document…
landingChat.dropHint: Drop files here — they will attach until you send
landingChat.sessionNote: This session is temporary. Refreshing or closing the page clears your chat and documents.
landingChat.needPayslip: I can’t validate a payslip yet because none is in this conversation. Please upload your payslip using the attach button or by dragging the file here.
landingChat.needId: I need your ID document, or you can type the relevant information here.
landingChat.extracting: Reading your document and preparing a digital version…
landingChat.reviewReady: Here is the extracted digital document. Please review and correct any fields, then confirm before validation starts.
landingChat.confirmBeforeValidate: Edit any label or value, then confirm. Validation uses the confirmed document.
landingChat.extractionEmpty: We could not extract usable information from this document.
landingChat.confirmBlockedEmpty: Add or correct at least one field before confirming.

errors.ocrFailed: Text recognition (OCR) did not succeed for this file.
errors.parserFailed: Structured field extraction did not produce usable values.
errors.retryHint: Try a clearer PDF or image, or upload again.

landingChat.userConfirmed: I confirm the extracted information is correct.
landingChat.validationReady: Validation finished. AI can explain results, but it does not decide pass or fail.
landingChat.unavailableReason: This check could not run because required documents or data are missing.
landingChat.aiDoesNotDecide: Deterministic rules decide the result. AI explanations do not change pass or fail.
landingChat.supportingStored: {{type}} was added to this conversation. Confirm your payslip to include it in validation when possible.

tips.taxCredits: Check whether your number of children is up to date.
tips.releasedSoldier: You may be entitled to additional tax credits.
tips.travel: Verify that your work location is current.

explain.identity: Compare the extracted identity details with the values you expect.
explain.salary: The extracted salary is shown for your review against expected pay.
explain.taxCredits: Tax credit points may differ from employee information on file.
explain.period: Confirm the payroll period matches the month you intended to check.

assistant.title: Payroll Assistant
assistant.intro: Ask about your payslip, overtime, leave, taxes, and what documents help confirm your pay.
assistant.empty: Start with a suggested question, or type your own.
assistant.unavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
assistant.guardrailBlocked: I can only help with payroll and payslip-related questions.
assistant.guardrailLimited: Here’s general guidance based on what I can confirm right now.
assistant.noSource: I shared general guidance because an exact matching reference wasn’t available.
assistant.followUp1: What supporting documents should I upload?
assistant.followUp2: Can you explain overtime on a payslip?
assistant.followUp3: What does a payslip warning usually mean?
assistant.suggested1: What documents are needed to validate a payslip?
assistant.suggested2: How should overtime be reflected on a payslip?
assistant.suggested3: What is the difference between a validation warning and a critical issue?

validate.title: Validate My Payslip
validate.intro: Upload your payslip and optional supporting documents. We’ll walk you through a clear checklist.
validate.validating: Uploading your files and preparing the checklist…
validate.validatingChecklistHint: We're checking your reviewed payslip details against payroll rules.
validate.preparingHint: We're reading your payslip and preparing the details for review.
validate.preparingDetails: This may take a moment for larger files.
validate.documentLanguageHint: Choose the language that best matches your payslip text.
validate.dragHint: PDF, JPG, or PNG — up to 50MB
validate.payslipRequired: Please upload a payslip to continue.
validate.validationFailed: We couldn’t finish the checklist. Please try again.
validate.extractionFailed: We couldn’t read your payslip. Please try again.
validate.extractionOcrFailed: We couldn’t read the text from your document. Please try a clearer PDF or image.
validate.extractionParserFailed: We read your document, but some details could not be understood. Please try again.
validate.reviewLead: Review and edit the details read from your payslip before we run the checklist.
validate.reviewManualCheck: You can correct any field before continuing. Edits are saved as a new review version.
validate.reviewPartialNotice: We could only read some details from your document. Edit what you can, then continue.
validate.fieldUnableToRead: We could not read this field

slots.payslipWhy: Used to check salary, deductions, overtime, and line items.
slots.attendanceWhy: Helps confirm hours, overtime, and leave when that check is available.
slots.contractWhy: Helps compare pay against agreements when that check is available.
slots.nationalIdWhy: Helps identity and benefit checks when those checks are available.
slots.bankDetailsWhy: Bank account details for payment verification when available.
slots.taxFormWhy: Tax forms for withholding checks when available.

uploadErrors.duplicate: This file has already been selected.
uploadErrors.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type for this slot ({{type}}).
uploadErrors.invalidPdf: This PDF looks invalid or corrupted.
uploadErrors.injection: This file contains unsupported instruction-like content.

report.noIssues: No issues were found in the completed checks.
report.explainNote: Plain-language explanation based on the checklist item.
report.explainFailed: An explanation could not be prepared for this item.
report.confidenceUnavailable: Confidence not available for this item
report.recCritical: Review this with your payroll administrator before approving payment.
report.recWarning: Double-check this payslip detail and any supporting records.
report.recInfo: Keep supporting records on file for completeness.

upload.pageDescription: Select the payroll period, upload your payslip, review identity and period checks, then confirm for validation.
upload.title: Employee payslip review
upload.intro: Your employee record is matched on the server. Confirmation is blocked when National ID or payroll period do not match.
upload.periodHint: Choose the year and month this payslip belongs to. The system will not silently change it to the extracted period.
upload.periodRequired: Select a payroll year and month before uploading.
upload.confirmAcknowledgement: I confirm that the extracted information is correct
upload.acknowledgementRequired: Please confirm that the extracted information is correct.
upload.confirmBeforeValidate: Confirm the extracted information before running validation.
upload.confirmBlocked: Fix critical identity or period mismatches before confirmation.
upload.duplicatePeriod: A payslip already exists for this period.
upload.duplicateDetail: Uploading again will create a new document version and keep the previous one.
upload.extractingHint: Reading your payslip and preparing a digital form for review.
upload.extractionCancelled: Extraction cancelled. You can upload again when ready.
upload.validatingHint: Checking confirmed payslip details against payroll rules.
upload.validationCancelled: Validation cancelled. Your confirmed extraction is unchanged.
upload.noExtractedFields: No fields were extracted from this document.

errors.extraction_not_confirmed: Confirm the extracted information before validation.

validation.legendHint: Status uses icons and labels in addition to color.
validation.noRules: No validation rules were returned for this run.
validation.cannotValidateReason: Required information is missing, so this check could not be completed.

findings.generic: A validation check needs your attention.
findings.validation_missing_data: Required data is missing to complete this check.
findings.validation_overtime_daily_limit_exceeded: Overtime exceeds the allowed daily limit.
findings.validation_minimum_wage_below_threshold: Pay is below the minimum wage threshold.
findings.validation_pension_insufficient_contribu: Pension contribution is below the required level.
findings.validation_youth_below_minimum_age: Employee age is below the legal minimum.
findings.validation_department_intern_hours_excee: Intern hours exceed the department limit.
findings.validation_department_lawyers_overtime_c: Lawyer overtime exceeds the department cap.
findings.validation_historical_salary_drift: Unusual salary drift was detected versus history.

scopeReasons.generic: This validation area could not be fully completed.
scopeReasons.extraction_not_connected: Document extraction is not yet connected for this area.
scopeReasons.payroll_extraction_connected: Payroll rules ran on extracted payslip fields.
scopeReasons.payroll_core_fields_incomplete: Some core fields are missing or unusable.

validation.aiExplanationDisclaimer: This explanation does not change the validation result.
validation.aiUnavailable: An AI explanation is unavailable right now. The deterministic result above remains valid.

pages.dashboardDescription: Overview of your recent payslips, validation status, and document activity.
pages.attendanceDescription: Review attendance records, leave balances, and imported attendance reports.
pages.contractDescription: Access your employment agreement and related documents.
pages.chatDescription: Ask questions about your payslips and employment terms. AI provides explanations only — not compliance decisions.
pages.validationHistoryDescription: Browse past validation runs, findings, and confidence breakdowns.

digitalForm.valueTooLong: This value is too long to save here. Shorten it and try again.
digitalForm.deleteFieldMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently remove this field from the digital payslip? This action cannot be undone.

compare.title: Identity and period check
compare.intro: These results come from the server. The app does not re-compare National ID in the browser.
compare.nationalIdMismatch: National ID does not match your employee record. Replace the file or correct the extracted value.
compare.periodMismatch: Selected period {{selected}} does not match extracted period {{extracted}}. Change the period or replace the file.
compare.nameMismatchWarning: Employee name differs from your record. Confirmation is still allowed when National ID matches.
compare.nameLanguageMismatch: The extracted name and your registered profile use different languages, therefore automatic comparison could not be performed.

workspace.pageDescription: Upload, extract, review, and validate this month’s payslip in one workspace.
workspace.emptyHint: Upload a payslip for this month to begin digital review.
workspace.extractHint: Your file is stored. Extract it when you are ready to build the digital form.
workspace.extractingStatus: Your document was received. We are preparing the digital payslip form.
workspace.deleteOriginalMessage: Deleting this document will permanently remove it from the system. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.extractCompareHint: Review the current digital version against the new extraction before replacing.
workspace.replaceHint: Select another file to replace this month’s payslip. Extraction will create a new digital payslip.
workspace.originalReadOnlyHint: The stored original stays unchanged here. Choose a replacement file only when you want to extract again.
workspace.replaceConfirmMessage: Replacing this document will permanently delete the current digital payslip, validation history, and extracted data. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.digitalEmpty: No digital payslip yet. Extract a document from the Upload tab.
workspace.validationOutdated: Validation needs to be run again.
workspace.noValidationYet: No validation results yet. Confirm the digital payslip, then run validation.
workspace.storedValidationSummary: Previous validation results for this month.
workspace.periodMismatchPrompt: The uploaded payslip appears to belong to {{month}}/{{year}}.

payslips.pageDescription: Open a month to work in your digital payroll workspace — upload, extract, review, and validate.
payslips.payslipMissing: No payslip uploaded for this month.
payslips.attendanceMissing: No attendance report uploaded for this month.
payslips.attendanceNotConnected: The attendance file is stored, but attendance comparison is not connected yet.

missing.payslip_missing: Payslip is missing — payroll checks cannot run until one is uploaded.
missing.attendance_missing: Attendance report is missing — attendance-related checks stay unavailable.
missing.extraction_not_confirmed: Payslip extraction is not confirmed yet.

payslips.reviewMissing: No extracted payslip data for this month yet.
payslips.outdatedResult: This result may be outdated because a newer extraction exists.
payslips.duplicateMessage: A payslip already exists for this month. Create a new version and keep the previous document?

analytics.emptyTitle: No salary data for this year
analytics.emptyDescription: Upload and extract payslips with a payroll period to see net and gross trends.
analytics.grossVsNetTitle: Gross vs net by payroll month

documents.pageDescription: Manage your ID card, ID appendix, and employment contract in one workspace — the same upload, digital form, and original document pattern as My Payslips.
documents.persistentIntro: Identity and employment documents that stay with your profile.
documents.monthlyIntro: Payslips, attendance, and validation history are organized by year and month.
documents.uploadHint: Select a file, then extract its Digital Form.
documents.emptyHint: Upload {{type}} to begin. You can replace it later from this tab.
documents.originalReadOnlyHint: The stored {{type}} file stays unchanged until you choose a replacement above.
documents.replaceConfirmMessage: Continuing will permanently replace the existing Digital Form and original {{type}}, and remove the previous version. The previous file remains intact if extraction fails.
documents.replaceHint: A replacement file is selected. Extract its Digital Form to replace the stored {{type}}.
documents.digitalFormNotice: Review and edit extracted fields for this document.
documents.fixedFormNotice: Fill these payroll fields manually, or extract them from an uploaded document.

appendix.emptyChildren: No children yet. Add a child or upload an appendix to extract them.

documents.cardEmpty: No document yet. Upload a file to get started.
documents.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved edits. If you leave now, your changes will be lost.
documents.deleteIntro: Choose what to delete. This cannot be undone.
documents.deleteOriginalHint: Removes the uploaded file. The digital form is kept if present.
documents.deleteDigitalHint: Removes extracted and edited fields. The original file is kept if present.
documents.deleteBothHint: Permanently removes the original file and the digital form.
documents.deleteConfirmIntroPlural: You are about to permanently delete:
documents.deleteDisabledNoOriginal: Delete is available after an original document is uploaded.
documents.deleteDisabledNothing: Nothing to delete yet. Upload a document or save a digital form first.
documents.deleteBothDisabledHint: Both original and digital form are required for this option.

validation.nationalIdDigits: National ID must contain digits only.
validation.nationalIdLength: National ID must be exactly 9 digits.
validation.dateUnrecognized: Unrecognized date format. Use the date picker or a common format such as DD.MM.YYYY.
validation.childIncomplete: All fields are required for this child.
validation.nameInvalid: Enter a valid name using letters only.

documents.nationalIdFoundation: National ID review structure is ready. Automatic field extraction is not connected yet — no fabricated fields are shown.
documents.nationalIdReviewDescription: Review your stored National ID document. Automatic extraction is not connected yet.
